hero.title: Professional film equipment rental
hero.subtitle: Equipment selected for professional sets, with technical support available on request. Available in Palermo and nationwide for structured productions.
hero.imageAlt: Professional film equipment available for rental

intro.body: Marvin Drone provides professional film equipment for cinema, TV series, advertising and documentary productions, intended for on-set use and configurable according to operational needs.
intro.footnote: Operating base in Palermo, Sicily, with availability across Italy.

archive.emptyDescription: Connect Strapi and publish at least one rental item to populate this page.
archive.emptyFilterTitle: There are no items for these filters
archive.emptyFilterDescription: Try another brand or usage, or reset the filters.

conditions.title: Rental terms and operating conditions
conditions.body: Rental is reserved for professional on-set use. Availability and conditions are confirmed according to dates, location and production plan, to ensure reliable configurations ready for production.
conditions.note: On request: delivery/collection and on-set technical support.

contact.title: Contact us for availability
contact.body: Write to us with dates, location, department and equipment list, or the type of shoot you need.
contact.note: We will reply with availability and the recommended configuration.

eligibility.question: Who is the rental service for?
eligibility.answer: Rental is intended for structured productions and industry professionals working in cinema, TV series, advertising and documentaries. The equipment is designed for on-set use and is confirmed according to dates, locations and production planning.

oneDay.question: Is one-day rental possible?
oneDay.answer: Yes, depending on availability and the type of equipment required. For tight schedules and active sets, it is recommended to specify dates and time windows so operational feasibility can be checked.

kits.question: Do you provide complete kits or only single items?
kits.answer: Both options are available. On request we can propose a complete configuration, including body, essential accessories, power and supports, aligned with the production workflow to reduce on-set issues.

realtime.question: Is availability shown in real time?
realtime.answer: The list shows equipment available in the catalogue, but actual availability is confirmed according to dates and production priorities. For a quick check, send the equipment list and rental period.

delivery.question: Do you offer delivery and collection outside Palermo?
delivery.answer: Yes, on request. The operating base is Palermo, with nationwide availability: delivery, collection and logistics are evaluated according to location, schedule and requested configuration.

documents.question: Which documents are required for rental?
documents.answer: Production details and reference contacts are generally required, together with the information needed to formalise conditions and responsibilities. Exact details are shared during confirmation according to the type of equipment.

deposit.question: Is a deposit or insurance required?
deposit.answer: It depends on the type of equipment and rental duration. Conditions, including any deposit or insurance, are defined at confirmation time in line with the production profile.

support.question: Do you offer technical support or prep assistance?
support.answer: Yes, on request. We can support the prep phase, including configuration checks, compatibility review and essential setup, to ensure the kit is ready for the set.

quote.question: How do I request a quote and availability?
quote.answer: Contact us on WhatsApp with dates, location, production type and equipment list, or the shooting requirement. We will reply with availability and conditions.

meta.indexDescription: Professional film equipment rental page with catalogue filters, operating conditions, FAQ and direct WhatsApp contact.
